name: Landmarks
description: Eight landmark roles that identify major sections of a page, helping assistive technology users understand page structure typically conveyed visually.

roles.description: Site-wide header, typically containing logo and nav. Use <header> (not inside <article>/<section>)
Primary content. Use <main>. Only one per page
Content related but separate from main. Use <aside>
A form when it has an accessible name. Use <form> with aria-label/aria-labelledby
A perceivable section with accessible name. Use <section> with aria-label/aria-labelledby
Search facility. Use <search> element or role='search'

required_attributes.description: Unique accessible name to distinguish multiple landmarks of same type

notes: Prefer HTML5 semantic elements over ARIA roles: <header>, <nav>, <main>, <aside>, <footer>, <section>, <form>, <search>
When multiple landmarks of the same type exist, each must have a unique accessible name
All page content should be within a landmark
